name: error-monitor
description: Receives error alerts from Sentry, Bugsnag, and Datadog. Auto-files Mycelium bugs with stack traces and deduplication.
author: SoftBacon Software

configSchema.label: Error Provider
configSchema.description: Which error tracking service to receive webhooks from

configSchema.label: Auto-assign Bugs
configSchema.description: Automatically assign bugs to agents based on recent task history

configSchema.label: Auto-file Threshold
configSchema.description: Minimum error occurrences before auto-filing a bug (0 = file immediately)

configSchema.label: Default Project
configSchema.description: Mycelium project ID for new bugs

configSchema.label: Default Severity
configSchema.description: Default bug severity for new errors
